'''chachogo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:whaleshark|whaleshark]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-ch-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:whaleshark|whaleshark]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| chachogo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:chæchegeth|chæchegeth]] || [[word:chæchegej|chæchegej]] || [[word:chæchegesh|chæchegesh]] || [[word:chæchege|chæchege]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:chachochogoth|chachochogoth]] || [[word:chachochogoj|chachochogoj]] || [[word:chachochogosh|chachochogosh]] || [[word:chachochogo|chachochogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:chachogoth|chachogoth]] || [[word:chachogoj|chachogoj]] || [[word:chachogosh|chachogosh]] || [[word:chachogo|chachogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:chachofgoth|chachofgoth]] || [[word:chachofgoj|chachofgoj]] || [[word:chachofgosh|chachofgosh]] || [[word:chachofgof|chachofgof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chachogotho|chachogotho]] || [[word:chachogojo|chachogojo]] || [[word:chachogosho|chachogosho]] || [[word:chachogoko|chachogoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chachogoth|chachogoth]] || [[word:chachogoj|chachogoj]] || [[word:chachogosh|chachogosh]] || [[word:chachogo|chachogo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chachogothol|chachogothol]] || [[word:chachogojol|chachogojol]] || [[word:chachogoshol|chachogoshol]] || [[word:chachogokol|chachogokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chachogothotho|chachogothotho]] || [[word:chachogojojo|chachogojojo]] || [[word:chachogoshosho|chachogoshosho]] || [[word:chachogoko|chachogoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chachogothon|chachogothon]] || [[word:chachogojon|chachogojon]] || [[word:chachogoshon|chachogoshon]] || [[word:chachogokon|chachogokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chachogothoro|chachogothoro]] || [[word:chachogojoro|chachogojoro]] || [[word:chachogoshoro|chachogoshoro]] || [[word:chachogokoro|chachogokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|654f723}}
